_note: This file drives the ENTIRE pricing page (website/src/pages/pricing.astro). Every visible string lives here — nothing is hardcoded in the component. Edit this file to change prices, plans, chips, CTAs, the comparison table, or the FAQ. Structure: `hostingToggle` = the two-option Cloud/Self-hosted switch; `plansByMode` = the plan cards shown for each toggle option (cloud = 3 cards, selfHosted = 2 cards); `comparison` = the always-visible side-by-side table (independent of the toggle, shows all five plans as columns); `faqs` = the FAQ accordion. In `comparison.groups[].rows[].cells`, `true` renders a check, `false` renders a dash, and a string renders as-is. Plan card `chip` is a small pill above the price (null = no chip); `popular` = true gives the highlighted card chrome; `cta.style` is `primary` (yellow) or `outline`.

cloud.name: Pro
features: First 10k traces / month free, then $5 per 10k

cloud.name: Business
cloud.tagline: For scaling teams that need governance.
features: First 1M traces / month free, then $5 per 10k

selfHosted.name: Open source
selfHosted.tagline: The full platform, running on your own infrastructure.

selfHosted.name: Enterprise
selfHosted.tagline: For organizations with security and compliance needs.

faqs.question: Is Agenta really open source?
faqs.answer: Yes. The core platform is open source under a permissive license and you can self-host the full stack for free, forever. The cloud plans add managed hosting, higher limits, and team features on top.

faqs.question: What counts as a trace?
faqs.answer: A trace is one end-to-end run of your LLM app or agent — every step, prompt, tool call, and response captured for observability. Cloud plans include a monthly trace volume, with pay-as-you-go for anything beyond it.

faqs.question: Can I switch plans or cancel anytime?
faqs.answer: Yes. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel from your workspace settings at any time. Changes take effect right away.

faqs.question: Do you offer discounts for startups or academia?
faqs.answer: We do. Early-stage startups, students, and researchers can apply for discounted or free access — reach out to the team and tell us about your project.

faqs.question: What happens when I hit my usage limit?
faqs.answer: Nothing breaks. On Pro and Business, traces beyond your included volume are billed at $5 per 10k traces, so you keep shipping without interruption. On Hobby you can upgrade any time to raise your limits, and we notify you before you get close.

faqs.question: How does Enterprise self-hosting work?
faqs.answer: Enterprise customers can deploy Agenta in their own cloud or on-prem with SSO/MFA, SOC 2, audit logs, and a dedicated SLA. Our team supports the rollout and ongoing operations.
